generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder mounted directly on motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder mounted behind gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor for input current measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentSensorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance SecondaryEncoderPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance CurrentSensorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance MeasuredCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured current data from input current sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentSensorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance MeasuredTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque derived from current sensor measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentSensorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance MeasuredAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity derived from motor encoder position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulatedCoulombViscousOutput : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated Coulomb and Viscous friction model output"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentSensorCurrentDataTransmitted, MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulatedStribeckOutput : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated Stribeck friction model output"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentSensorCurrentDataTransmitted, MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulatedDahlOutput : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated Dahl friction model output"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentSensorCurrentDataTransmitted, MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulatedLuGreOutput : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated LuGre friction model output"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentSensorCurrentDataTransmitted, MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SysMLStructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block and Internal Block Diagrams for structural modeling"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model for Coulomb and Viscous friction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model for Stribeck friction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model for Dahl friction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model for LuGre friction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance AAS : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells for digital twin asset management"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
]

instance AASData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell data for digital twin asset management"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentSensorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML tooling for structural modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelValidationService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink for friction model simulations"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousFrictionModelIdentificationService, RealTimeDashboardVisualizationService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells for asset management"
    DTDFVocab:enables AssetManagementService
]

instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data streaming"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDashboardVisualizationService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard tools for friction data visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDashboardVisualizationService
]

instance ContinuousFrictionModelIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of white-box and black-box friction models for motion accuracy improvement"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionModelInsight, AdjustControlAlgorithmAction
]

instance RealTimeDashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time dashboard visualization of friction-related data"
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardVisualizationInsight
]

instance ModelValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Model validation using SysML"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelValidationInsight
]

instance AssetManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Asset management services using Asset Administration Shells"
    DTDFVocab:provides AssetManagementInsight
]

instance FrictionModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction model insights used to adjust control algorithms for improved motion accuracy"
]

instance AdjustControlAlgorithmAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust control algorithms based on friction model insights to improve motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DashboardVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time dashboard visualization of friction-related data for monitoring"
]

instance ModelValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Model validation insights from SysML structural models"
]

instance AssetManagementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Asset management insights from Asset Administration Shells"
]

instance FirstAxisMABIMAX100 : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "First axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    base:contains MotorComponent, GearwheelComponent, CycloidalGearboxComponent
]

instance MotorComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Motor component in the first axis"
]

instance GearwheelComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Gearwheel component in the first axis"
]

instance CycloidalGearboxComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox component in the first axis"
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with sensor data streaming."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integration of SysML models, Simulink simulations, Asset Administration Shells (AAS), MQTT data streaming, and dashboard for unified digital shadow visualization and analysis."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As-operated phase, monitoring and modeling during robot operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Comparison of simulated friction models against measured data to validate accuracy and identify deviations."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for sensor data transmission."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) and SysML standards."
]
